chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْحُبِّ فِي اللَّهِ وَ الْبُغْضِ فِي اللَّهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 60 – The love regarding Allah<sup>azwj</sup> and the hatred regarding Allah<sup>azwj</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (266/ 8)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (266/ 8)
text: كُلُّ مَنْ لَمْ يُحِبَّ عَلَى الدِّينِ وَ لَمْ يُبْغِضْ عَلَى الدِّينِ فَلَا دِينَ لَهُ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Imran Al Sabi’e, from Abdullah Bin Jabala, from Is’haq Bin Ammar,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Everyone who does not love upon the Religion and does not hate upon the Religion, so there is no Religion for him’.
en.sarwar: 16. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Imran al-Subay’i from ‘Abd Allah ibn Jabalah from Ishaq ibn ‘Ammar from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Whoever does not love because of religion and does not hate because of religion has no religion.”
